title: Reachplus
description: This mod gives Java players the same Spherical reach as bedrock making reach abilities even across the board when playing cross platform servers or to just improve game play in a personal world
body: This Mod gives Java players the same spherical reach as Bedrock players making it just as easy to build and fight off enemies in java as it is in Bedrock. This makes a BIG difference for builders for sure! It also makes it even across the board for people who own or play on a cross platform server. This mod can be used on fabric servers that opt in and allow the use of this mod and it can also be used on paper servers that have ReachPlusLink installed.
